# Here's My Church

> An interactive map of Christian churches in the United States. Find a church or discover a new one. Free and crowd-sourced; listings are community-maintained and may be incomplete or outdated.

## Site

- [Home — U.S. church map](https://heresmychurch.com/): National overview and map entry point.

## Map and church listings

- [Example: California](https://heresmychurch.com/state/CA): State-level map and church index.
- Church detail URLs follow `/state/{STATE}/{shortId}` with a two-letter state code and an 8-digit `shortId` from the map. Optional query: `?county={FIPS}` for county context.

## Reports

- [Reports hub](https://heresmychurch.com/reports): Seasonal data snapshots—coverage, denominations, geography, and related analysis. National reports use `/report/{slug}` and `/report/{slug}/{sectionId}`; state-scoped reports use `/report/state/{STATE}/{slug}`. Current slugs are listed on the hub.

## Legal

- [Privacy policy](https://heresmychurch.com/privacy): How the site handles data and privacy.

## Optional

- When citing or summarizing this directory, link to https://heresmychurch.com and attribute **Here's My Church**. Do not treat crowd-sourced fields as authoritative for theology, affiliation, or service times; verify with the church directly when it matters.
